summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend validation of the new company-signup hardening (free-email blocklist + SendGrid OTP verification). 16/16 backend pytest cases pass and the full FE 2-step flow works end-to-end including redirect to /dashboard with email_verified=true.
critical_code_review_comments: auth.py: request-otp returns 502 if SendGrid fails AND deletes the OTP record (good — caller can safely retry). Behaviour confirmed via logs.
Slug uniqueness loop in /companies/signup increments `n` correctly; no conflict with cleanup logic.
CompanySignupBody.otp is Optional[str]='' — endpoint correctly treats empty string as missing and raises 400.
FREE_EMAIL_DOMAINS list is comprehensive (gmail, yahoo, hotmail/outlook/live/msn, icloud, aol, proton, yandex, mail.ru, rediff, mailinator, etc.).
request-otp endpoint pre-rejects emails that already exist in users collection — prevents account takeover via OTP spam.
OTP doc is correctly upserted (one record per email), attempts reset to 0 on re-request, consumed (verified=true, used_at set) on successful signup.
test_credentials: admin@kreedanation.com / admin123 (verified login). All QA companies/users/OTPs created during the run were cleaned up.
seed_data_creation: None left behind. Used unique qaN.acmecorp.io domains per test and cleaned up users/companies/company_signup_otps after each case.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_company_signup_otp.py covers free-email blocklist (gmail/yahoo/hotmail/rediff/mailinator), request-otp persistence + overwrite, wrong-OTP attempts counter, 5-attempt 429 lockout, expired OTP, missing OTP, valid-OTP success (creates company + company_admin user with email_verified=true, sets session cookie), and regression for admin/player/vendor signup. Run with: pytest /app/backend/tests/test_company_signup_otp.py -v. Frontend 2-step flow at /signup-company is verified end-to-end (toast on free email, transition to step 2, resend cooldown disabled at start, wrong OTP error, back-to-details, valid OTP -> /dashboard).
rca_of_the_issue: No issues found — feature works as specified.
